title: Kindred of the Dust
writer: Peter B. Kyne, James T. O'Donohoe
actors: Miriam Cooper, Ralph Graves, Lionel Belmore
plot: Discovering that her husband is a bigamist, Nan returns with her young child to her Puget Sound, Washington, logging town hoping to live with her father. Everyone treats her as an outcast until Donald McKaye, her childhood sweethe...
